case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY W RANDALL BAIL BONDS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY W RANDALL BAIL BONDS $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,108.00, TOTAL $15,108.00

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE; NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- DEFENDANT HENRY W. RANDALL BAIL BONDS' MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE IS GRANTED -- NO OPPOSITION FILED. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
